## [R&D] Pull Request

> **R&D owns:** Class design, method signatures, and JavaDoc specs.
> Do NOT implement business logic — stubs only.
> Push to `feature/<classname>` and notify Engineering when ready.

## What's being introduced?

## JavaDoc Checklist
- [ ] Class-level JavaDoc written (purpose, author, version)
- [ ] Every public method has `@param`, `@return`, `@throws`
- [ ] Stubs throw `UnsupportedOperationException` where needed

## Checklist
- [ ] Branched off `main` with `feature/<classname>` naming
- [ ] Signatures finalized and discussed with Engineering if it affects existing code
- [ ] Engineering notified and branch is ready for implementation
